data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design optimized for quick accessibility of controls, reducing cognitive load.
data.technical_spec: Placement of key interactive UI elements in easily reachable areas.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Streamlined decision paths in UI reduce user choice overload.
data.technical_spec: Minimal and clear menu options presented on interface.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: A visually appealing design contributes to the perceived ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes a sleek, modern interface with consistent color themes.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Related elements grouped together for intuitive navigation.
data.technical_spec: Items are clustered logically, such as genre categories and similar titles.

data.title: Law of Common Region
data.description: Elements sharing the same regions are perceived as related.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes card-based layouts to separate distinct episodes or shows.
